40:84:12.m: those who make partners (with Allah) (object of كُنَّا - we were)

40:85:3.m: he benefits them (subject of لَمْ يَكُ)

40:85:15.m: and he lost (connected to رَأَوْا۟ - they saw)

40:85:16.m: there/at that place or time (in this context: at that moment when they saw Our punishment)
